name: team stat with per_team_pass_play
description: Test case for team stat with per_team_pass_play
expected_query: with "td97ce88b74be8a447f18100b6a6dfcb0" as (select "nfl_plays"."off", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "play_type" = 'PASS' group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279" as (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats" as (select "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."nfl_team", sum(t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279" group by "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279"."nfl_team") select "player"."pid", CAST(t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats.team_pass_yds_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(td97ce88b74be8a447f18100b6a6dfcb0.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "td97ce88b74be8a447f18100b6a6dfcb0" on "td97ce88b74be8a447f18100b6a6dfcb0"."off" = "player"."current_nfl_team" left join "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats" on "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player"."current_nfl_team" group by "t2f399e85c6db881110a16375aa52c279_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", td97ce88b74be8a447f18100b6a6dfcb0.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
